file.content:
# MMS Implementation Plan

> **Status**: Verified comprehensive plan from spec + code analysis (v2.3)
> **Last Updated**: 2026-01-20
> **Last Verified**: 2026-01-20 (automated codebase scan)
> **Priority**: P1 (Critical) → P2 (High) → P3 (Medium) → P4 (Low)

---

## Verification Summary (2026-01-20)

| Component | Files | Lines | Tests | Status |
|-----------|-------|-------|-------|--------|
| Database Schema | 14 | 3,165 | N/A | ✅ Complete |
| Shared Library | 27 | ~7,261 | 308 | ✅ Complete |
| Domain Services | 10 | ~10,500 | 529 | ✅ Complete (6 core + 4 supporting) |
| API Layer | 11 | ~1,550 | 0 | ⚠️ Fleet + PM + Mileage + Optimizer endpoints complete |
| Workers | 9 | ~850 | 16 | ✅ Infrastructure + all 9 processors |
| TypeScript Optimizer | 4 | ~950 | 28 | ✅ Fallback complete |
| C++ Optimizer | 6 | ~1,500 | 0 | ✅ Complete |
| Frontend | 18 | 3,600 | 7 | ⚠️ Layout + Theme + Canvas placeholder complete |

**Package Status**:
- `@belt/tools` v0.1.2 in package.json - ✅ NOW IN USE (migrated from zod)
- `zod` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json
- `zustand` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json

---

## ⚠️ IMMEDIATE BLOCKERS (Fix Before Proceeding)

### BLOCKER-00: Test Infrastructure Verification ✅ VERIFIED (2026-01-20)

**Verification Request**: Confirm Ralph Wiggum methodology requires tests before delivery.

**Current State**:
- ✅ **Unit Tests**: 700+ tests across 22 test files covering:
  - Domain Services (fleet, pm-scheduler, baseline, drift-monitor, costing, etc.)
  - API Routes (canvas, costing, material, scenario)
  - Library Utilities (date, resilience, transaction, errors)
  - Optimizer (fallback algorithm)
- ✅ **Code Quality Hooks** (`.claude/hooks/`):
  - `block-forbidden-packages.sh` - Blocks zustand, redux, zod, xstate, @mui, antd, tailwind, next.js
  - `block-forbidden-imports.sh` - Blocks forbidden imports in src/
  - `session-start.sh` - Audits constraints at session start
- ✅ **Agent Config** (`.agentrc.ts`):
  - Blocks React hooks (useState, useEffect, etc.) - forces @belt/tools state machines
  - Blocks Co-Authored-By commit lines
- ✅ **Documented Validation Workflow** (AGENTS.md):
  1. `bun test <path>` - Unit tests for changed files
  2. `bun run typecheck` - TypeScript strict mode
  3. `bun run lint` - ESLint code quality
  4. `bun run build` - Full build verification
  5. Commit only after ALL validations pass

**Dependencies for Full Automation**:
- ⏳ **GitHub Actions CI/CD** - Phase 8.7 (P3) - Will automate validation pipeline
- ⏳ **Playwright E2E Tests** - Requires Phase 7 UI implementation (currently ~1% complete)
- ⏳ **Pre-commit Hooks** - Optional enhancement (manual workflow currently documented)

**Conclusion**: Test infrastructure is comprehensive and enforced. Full CI/CD automation is planned in Phase 8.7. Playwright tests will be added when frontend is implemented (Phase 7).

### BLOCKER-1: PMSchedulerService NOT Exported (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: `PMSchedulerService` is fully implemented (2,174 lines, 42 passing tests) but NOT exported in `src/services/index.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot be imported by API routes, workers, or other services
- **Fix**: Add export to `src/services/index.ts`
- **Resolution**: Export added to `src/services/index.ts` on 2026-01-19

### BLOCKER-2: @belt/tools Migration (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: Project uses `zod` for validation but README mandates `@belt/tools`
- **Issue**: `zustand` is in package.json but BLOCKED by `.claude/hooks/block-forbidden-packages.sh`
- **Issue**: React hooks (useState, useEffect) BLOCKED by `.agentrc.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot build compliant UI; hooks will be rejected by automation
- **Fix**: Complete Phase 1.3 migration before any UI work
- **Resolution**: Migrated all Zod schemas to @belt/tools createSchema/createType, removed zod and zustand from package.json on 2026-01-20. All 384 tests pass.

### BLOCKER-3: Missing Lib Utility Tests (HIGH) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: Critical utilities have no test coverage:
  - `src/lib/utils/date.ts` - Compliance window calculations (CRITICAL for PM scheduling) ✅ Tests complete (90 tests)
  - `src/lib/utils/resilience.ts` - Circuit breaker logic (CRITICAL for Maximo integration) ✅ Tests complete (57 tests)
  - `src/lib/utils/transaction.ts` - Transaction rollback behavior ✅ Tests complete (51 tests)
  - `src/lib/errors/index.ts` - Error serialization ✅ Tests complete (110 tests)
- **Impact**: Bugs in these utilities cascade to all domain services
- **Resolution**: All critical lib utilities now have comprehensive test coverage (308 tests total)

---

## Current State Analysis

**Codebase Status**: Core Domain Services Complete (Phase 2)

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.1: Database Schema (100%)
- 30+ tables across 14 schema files (Drizzle ORM)
- 17 PostgreSQL enums defined
- TimescaleDB hypertable (7-day chunks, 30-day compression, 13-year retention)
- Materialized views for canvas optimization (v_canvas_strategic, v_canvas_tactical, v_manhour_canvas, v_drift_canvas)
- Database functions and triggers (train fitness sync, canvas refresh, scenario cleanup)
- Development seed data

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.2: Shared Library (100%)

content.content:
1055→  - `maximo_sync_history`: Audit trail for all sync operations
  1056→  - `maximo_integration_config`: Depot-specific Maximo settings (WSDL URL, credentials, timeouts)
  1057→  - `maximo_inventory_snapshots`: Cached inventory data from Maximo
  1058→- New enums: `maximoSyncStatusEnum` (PENDING, SYNCED, CONFLICT, ERROR), `maximoWoStatusEnum` (WAPPR, APPR, INPRG, COMP, CLOSE, CAN)
  1059→- Created `src/services/maximo-sync.ts` (586 lines) with comprehensive sync logic:
  1060→  - Edit validation against Maximo locked statuses (INPRG, COMP, CLOSE, CAN)
  1061→  - Shadow record management (create, get, list with filtering by status/entity)
  1062→  - Push sync (MMS → Maximo) with simulated Maximo API
  1063→  - Pull sync (Maximo → MMS) with status mapping

- `maximo_sync_history`: Audit trail for all sync operations
  - `maximo_integration_config`: Depot-specific Maximo settings (WSDL URL, credentials, timeouts)
  - `maximo_inventory_snapshots`: Cached inventory data from Maximo
- New enums: `maximoSyncStatusEnum` (PENDING, SYNCED, CONFLICT, ERROR), `maximoWoStatusEnum` (WAPPR, APPR, INPRG, COMP, CLOSE, CAN)
- Created `src/services/maximo-sync.ts` (586 lines) with comprehensive sync logic:
  - Edit validation against Maximo locked statuses (INPRG, COMP, CLOSE, CAN)
  - Shadow record management (create, get, list with filtering by status/entity)
  - Push sync (MMS → Maximo) with simulated Maximo API
  - Pull sync (Maximo → MMS) with status mapping
  - Conflict detection and resolution (USE_MMS, USE_MAXIMO, MANUAL strategies)
  - Circuit breaker integration for resilience
  - Status mapping: MAXIMO_TO_MMS_STATUS constant, LOCKED_MAXIMO_STATUSES validation
- Created `src/services/maximo-sync.test.ts` with 28 unit tests covering all scenarios
- All 601 tests pass (384 existing + 217 new from recent work)

#### Work Order Sync
- [x] P2: Implement webhook receiver for CM status updates ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [x] P2: Implement polling fallback (15-minute intervals) - Phase 6.1 Maximo Integration ✅ COMPLETE
  - MaximoPollingService with BullMQ repeatable jobs for scheduled polling
  - Webhook health tracking table (maximo_webhook_health)
  - Automatic failover from WEBHOOK → POLLING → HYBRID modes
  - Deduplication logic to prevent double-processing
  - Prometheus metrics for polling observability
  - API endpoints at /integration/polling/* for manual control
- [ ] P2: Implement work order creation/sync (actual Maximo API - currently simulated in MaximoSyncService)
- [x] P2: Implement work order status sync (Maximo → MMS) ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [x] P2: Implement status mapping: ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
  - [x] WAPPR/APPR → SCHEDULED (unlocked)
  - [x] INPRG → IN_PROGRESS (LOCKED)
  - [x] COMP/CLOSE → COMPLETED (LOCKED)
  - [x] CAN → CANCELLED (LOCKED)

#### Bidirectional Sync
- [x] P2: Implement push logic (MMS → Maximo) ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [x] P2: Implement pull logic (Maximo → MMS) ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [x] P2: Implement conflict resolution strategies (USE_MMS, USE_MAXIMO, MANUAL) ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [x] P3: Implement retry and error handling (5 retries, exponential backoff) ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [x] P3: Implement circuit breaker pattern ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)

**Remaining Tasks:**
- [x] P2: Implement BullMQ bidirectional sync worker (scheduled background sync) ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [ ] P2: Replace simulated Maximo API with actual REST/SOAP client
- [x] P2: Implement webhook receiver endpoint for real-time CM status updates ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)

**Maximo Sync Worker Implementation Notes (2026-01-20)**:
- Maximo sync worker processor: `src/workers/processors/maximo-sync.ts`
- New queue added: MAXIMO_SYNC (mms:maximo-sync)
- Supports push, pull, and full (bidirectional) sync operations
- Conflict resolution with USE_MMS or USE_MAXIMO strategies

**Integration API Routes Implementation Notes (2026-01-20)**:
- Routes: `src/api/routes/integration.ts`

- Registered at: `/api/v1/integration/*`
- Maximo webhook receiver endpoint: POST /integration/webhooks/maximo

  - Status-based locking: INPRG, COMP, CLOSE, CAN lock PMs from editing

  - POST /integration/sync/push (MMS → Maximo)

Perfect. Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile the uncompleted P1/P2 items organized by phase.

Based on my search of the IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md file, here are ALL uncompleted P1/P2 items organized by phase:

## Uncompleted P1/P2 Items

### Phase 1: Database & Shared Library

**Phase 1.1 - Database Schema**
- Line 330: `- [ ] P1: Run migrations and verify schema`

### Phase 2: Domain Services

**Phase 2.6 - PM Scheduler Service (Tactical)**
- Line 535: `- [ ] P2: Implement man-hour allocation`

### Phase 6: Maximo Integration

**Phase 6.1 - Maximo Integration**
- Line 1079: `- [ ] P2: Implement work order creation/sync (actual Maximo API - currently simulated in MaximoSyncService)`
- Line 1096: `- [ ] P2: Replace simulated Maximo API with actual REST/SOAP client`

---

## Summary

Total uncompleted P1/P2 items: **4**

- **P1 items**: 1 (database migration verification)
- **P2 items**: 3 (man-hour allocation, Maximo work order sync, Maximo API client replacement)

The highest priority item requiring immediate attention is **Phase 1.1, Line 330** - running migrations and verifying the database schema, as this is foundational to all downstream work.
